div.head: The Greek Minister (Simopoulos) to the Secretary of the Treasury (Morgenthau)Handed to the Chief of the Division of Near Eastern Affairs, Department of State, by the First Secretary of the Greek Legation, March 29, 1934.
div.p:
Excellency: Under instructions from my Government, I have the honor to advise the United States Government that, on account of present difficulties, the Greek Government is compelled to postpone, in accordance with the option granted under Clause 2 of Part 1. of the Debt and Funding Agreement of May 10, 1929, between the United States and the Government of Greece, the payment of Bond No. 13,
dated January 1, 1928, and maturing July 1, 1934, in the amount of $150,000.00 on account of the funding indebtedness of the Government of Greece to the United States as specified in Part 1. of such agreement.
